metadata.description: A man in his 40s-50s with deep brown skin and some fine lines around the eyes and forehead. His face is oval with a defined jawline. His hair is very short, tightly cropped, and dyed a bright, light blonde, with a natural hairline. His eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. His eyebrows are medium thickness and gently arched. His nose has a broad bridge and a rounded tip. His lips are medium thickness with a soft, natural curve. He has a short, salt-and-pepper beard and mustache. His features suggest a mixed heritage. He has a gentle, closed-mouth smile and his head is angled slightly to the left.
